ai_coach.headline: No data was logged today, so adherence to the Gym Lifting plan cannot be verified.
ai_coach.readiness_assessment: Zero telemetry synced today (no sleep, HRV, RHR, or weight), and the scheduled lifting session shows 0 of 4 days logged this week. Without this data there's no way to confirm today matched the plan, which itself is the primary issue to fix tomorrow.
action_plan: Log today's weight and last night's sleep first thing tomorrow morning to restart the trend lines.
If today's lifting session happened, back-log it in Hevy tonight with sets/reps/weight before memory fades.
Log all meals against the 2750 kcal / 215g protein / 310g carb / 68g fat target for tomorrow in real time.
Wear/sync the tracker overnight so tomorrow's readiness (HRV, RHR, body battery) populates for the morning check-in.
Treat tomorrow as a reset day: confirm the scheduled lift happens and gets logged to break the 0/4 adherence streak.
ai_coach.nutrition_directive: Today's intake wasn't logged, so nothing can be compared to the 2750 kcal / 215g protein / 310g carb / 68g fat Gym Lifting target -- log every meal tomorrow in real time and keep hydration at 3.5-4.0 L, adding +1.0 L with electrolytes if a hard session lands.
ai_coach.weight_trend_note: No weight was logged today, so current position versus the glide path toward 83.0 kg cannot be assessed -- a scale entry tomorrow is needed to re-anchor the trend.
risk_flags: Zero telemetry and zero nutrition logging today -- adherence to plan is unverifiable, not just off-track.
Gym consistency is 0/4 scheduled days logged this week; confirm whether sessions are being missed or just not logged.

overview.summary: Every core metric (weight, RHR, HRV, sleep, steps, battery) is blank today, giving no picture of how the day actually went.
overview.suggestion: Sync the wearable and log weight tomorrow morning before anything else to restore visibility.

plan.summary: With no weight entries and no glide-path history populated, progress toward the 83.0 kg target and phase milestones can't be evaluated today.
plan.suggestion: Weigh in tomorrow under consistent conditions (same time, post-bathroom) to give the glide path its next data point.

training.suggestion: If tomorrow's session is scheduled, defend the working weights on the compound lifts per plan and log it in Hevy immediately after finishing.

gym.summary: No session data exists to evaluate against the split or recent PRs.
